title: Vladivostok, Primorsky Krai — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vladivostok, Primorsky Krai: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vladivostok is a city in Primorsky Krai with a population of 605,000. Russia’s Pacific port city, a dynamic hub for trade and culture, home to the famous Golden Horn Bridge and Russky Island.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
